## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Infra/ops

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Compose runtime smoke check completed
- [ ] For UI changes, screenshot/video attached

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] README or docs updated if needed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Risk and rollback approach documented

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out key files, edge cases, and any follow-up tasks.
